scripts.init-db: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const { exec } = require('child_process'); exec('psql -U ' + process.env.DB_USER + ' -d ' + process.env.DB_NAME + ' -h ' + process.env.DB_HOST + ' -f sql/schema.sql', (err, stdout, stderr) => { if (err) { console.error(err); process.exit(1); } console.log(stdout); });"
